full_transcript: The choice of features can have a huge impact on your learning algorithms performance. In fact, for many practical applications, choosing or entering the right features is a critical step to making the algorithm work well. In this video, let's take a look at how you can choose or engineer the most appropriate features for your learning algorithm. So depending on what insights you may have into the application, rather than just taking the features that you happen. start off with, sometimes by defining your features, you might be able to get a much better model.
